active_checklist: Lane 5: ensure SensibLaw task memory/timeline bridge artifacts feed the same Kanboard plan/sync shape. Own SensibLaw bridge export/tests and cross-project dry-run fixture checks.

lane_claim: Manager lane 5: ensure SensibLaw task memory/timeline bridge artifacts feed the same Kanboard plan/sync shape. Workers are optional only for independent sidecars with disjoint write sets.
